meta_title: Removals and Assistance With Your Home Move Brighton
meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete home move and storage service to clients across Brighton and Sussex. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, we provide a local & national removals service to clients in Brighton, Hove and across Sussex.
intro_paragraph: Choosing the right removals firm to move your furniture and possessions is extremely important. You need to know you have secured good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the morning of your move will understand your requirements properly and have both the training and correct equipment to ensure a successful and straightforward move.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Premier Removals Brighton and Sussex

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving we offer a complete moving and storage service. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, you can put your trust in us to look after your move.

How can we help you today?

Let us make your home move journey in Brighton as 'Smooth as Silk'

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving  

Choosing the right removals firm to move your furniture and possessions is extremely important. You need to know you have secured good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the morning of your move will understand your requirements properly and have both the training and correct equipment to ensure a successful and straightforward move.

Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete moving service for removals in Brighton, Hove and the surrounding area of Sussex. From moving single items like 3 piece suites across Brighton, to moving entire households up to Scotland, we are well equipped with the necessary equipment, staff and skill to handle your move with ease.

A moving company you can trust

Mark Ratcliffe has been working in the UK domestic removals and storage market, working with customers throughout Brighton, the South East and nationally, for over 30 years. Quality is at the heart of everything we do, it is what we have built our well respected reputation within the industry upon. Our removal firm are one of just a handful with a dedicated staff training centre and all of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, wrapping and moving household furniture for home and overseas moving, as well as vehicle loading and customer services. You can expect the highest standards, competitive prices and a real commitment from everyone involved in your move when choosing Mark Ratcliffe Moving.

Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home at a time convenient for you to carry out an onsite survey and discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move. Packing requirements and insurance cover for your valuable possessions can also be discussed during this time. A fixed quotation can be provided for moving, packing and storage and we also offer a house clearance service that we can provide additional information on. On your moving day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect your carpets, cover exposed banisters and doors etc. If required, they will also pack and move your belongings with the utmost care and transport them safely to your new home in Brighton or further afield.

Professional Packing Service 

As part of Mark Ratcliffe Moving's fully comprehensive service, we provide a full packing option or packing of fragile items only. If you would prefer to carry out your own packing prior to your move day, we can provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc...all at a minimal cost and these can be collected from our shop located in Eastbourne, 7 days a week.

Safe and Secure Storage in Brighton  

We also offer secure self storage rooms to rent for customers who prefer to deposit / remove their own goods to / from store. Various size rooms are available with our most popular size being 77 sqft which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. We rent this size room at £30 plus vat per week and our storage rooms are much higher than local competitors with charges being over 50% less. Please feel free to call in at any time to view our rooms and satisfy yourself that your valuable possessions will be stored in a secure, damp free and clean environment with great access for loading / unloading with you being the only key holder.

Whether you are moving within Brighton or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready and able to help. We can satisfy all of your wider moving needs including secure storage, export packing and house clearance. Our friendly team would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Please call Sharon Harris at our Eastbourne branch on 01323 848 008 to talk through your moving requirements. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or by appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store customers is also available.
